content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.42% with sector rotation: defence (HAL +6.3%), capital goods (BHEL +6.1%), metals (VEDL +11%), ports (ADANIPORTS +4.7%) leading; Realty -1.45%, Banking soft. VIX 18.15 elevated but stable. Book is well-deployed at 49% with multiple winners that need SL discipline. Priority is locking in gains on movers, not adding fresh risk into the close.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23880,
      "nifty_resistance": 24080
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD posture — current SL 1029 is already ~1.4% below CMP 1043.40, which is appropriate trail-gap. Position +5.9%, MACD bullish, brokerage TPs Rs 1,350. Not raising further this tick to preserve normal intraday breathing room (any tighter and the 1037-1041 base would stop us out). Effectively HOLD; emitting MODIFY with same values is no-op so emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 sits 1.4% below CMP — appropriate trail gap. Position +5.9%, target 1110 intact. No adjustment warranted; do not micro-tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.5%, CMP 121.96 vs SL 119 (~2.4% breathing room). Geopolitical hedge thesis intact, gold ETF inflows record FY26. Mild MACD bearish but support at 121.05. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.0%, CMP 1735 with 52-week high broken at 1748. Current SL 1715 already trails ~1.2% below CMP — keeping it there preserves trail-gap discipline (any tighter risks ordinary intraday flush given today's 1719-1757 range). Strong Q4 + April monthly cargo +15% YoY. Same as stored — no-op MODIFY → emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already 1.2% below CMP 1735 — appropriate trail. Today's intraday range 1719-1757 means tighter SL would cause self-stopout. Stored values still optimal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.5%, CMP 13481 vs SL 13400 (only 0.6% buffer — tight). However stock recovered intraday from 13360 low and Auto sector momentum strong (record April sales +33%, JM TP 16,570). Holding to SL; if breached on close, exit. Not modifying — SL is at the right protective level."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position now +ve at CMP 206.90 vs entry 209 essentially flat (was -1.2%, now ~-1%). SL 204 is 1.4% below CMP — appropriate. Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA -140bps. Stored SL still optimal — no-op, convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "SL 204 sits 1.4% below CMP 206.90 — proper trail gap respecting Day-10 lesson on premature SL tightening. Q4 turnaround thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, CMP 4613.70. SL 4555 is 1.3% below — fine. BUT: HAL has Q4 board meeting May 14 (~7 sessions out, beyond 3-session binary window so no event-trim required yet). Current SL adequate; same as stored — convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "reasoning": "SL 4555 = 1.3% below CMP 4613.70, proper trail. Q4 results May 14 is beyond 3-session binary window; will tighten/exit closer to date. Defence sector momentum strong, new CMD catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%, CMP 374.10 vs SL 372 (only 0.6% buffer — very tight). Stock sold off from intraday high 388.40 to 374, showing fade after Q4 euphoria. Holding to SL; if 372 breaks exit cleanly. Tightening further would be self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%, CMP 1466.40 vs SL 1420 (~3.2% buffer). Q4 PAT +125%, net debt negative, but stock faded hard from 1577 high to 1458 low — gap-up sold into. Realty sector weak (-1.45%). Holding to SL; concall at 5pm could provide direction."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, CMP 6983 vs SL 6850 (~1.9% buffer). Volume surge 7.7x, MACD strongly bullish (+67), broke above prior 6816 swing. Trail-gap is appropriate; not tightening as today's range was 6765-7010 — wide intraday vol, need room."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already ~1.4% below CMP, proper trail; +5.9% winner with brokerage TP Rs 1,350 ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge intact; -2.5% within SL tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1.2% below CMP, today's range was wide (1719-1757); tighter SL = self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight 0.6% buffer to SL; let it work or stop out cleanly."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround intact, SL trail proper at 1.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 14 — will revisit positioning ~3 sessions before; SL appropriate now."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight stop, faded from highs; let SL decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up sold; concall tonight may guide direction. SL has 3.2% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6850.00,
      "reasoning": "Trend intact, volume surge 7.7x; SL provides room for intraday vol."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VEDL — skip: ex-demerger artifact, price discovery incomplete until mid-June listing of 4 new entities; not a clean entry. CAMS — interesting Q4 + RTA tailwind but stock already +7% today, intraday faded from 799 to 790; better to wait for consolidation. M&M — strong Q4 but did not request data; revisit on next pulse. LALPATHLAB / TATATECH / ADANIGREEN / FLUOROCHEM / COLPAL — not selected for deep-data, no entry decisions warranted from this batch.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is at 49% deployed with 9 positions across Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), Capital Goods/Defence (HAL, BHEL — same cluster, watch this), Auto (MARUTI), Realty (SOBHA), Services (ADANIPORTS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Gold ETF. Capital Goods cluster (HAL + BHEL) is the only cluster concern but combined ~10% of capital — within limits. No new entries this tick: late session (14:08, 1h21m to close), market neutral-to-soft, several positions need decisive movement on their own SLs/targets before adding correlated risk. Day's realized + unrealized = +0.31%, healthy. Avoiding the Day-5/Day-10 pattern of stacking late-session entries on top of binary calendar (HAL May 14 board, BANDHANBNK already reported, MARUTI AGM Aug). Discipline > activity."
}
